name: sample-db
description: EXAMPLE — replace with your database. The queries below are the ONLY SQL the agent may execute; add one entry per check your tests need. DDL (DROP/TRUNCATE/ALTER) is refused even if defined here.

queries.name: todo-by-title
queries.description: Verify a todo row exists by title
queries.query: SELECT TOP 1 Id, Title, Status FROM Todos WHERE Title = '{title}' ORDER BY Id DESC
